iti1:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti1:2.1: “Abandon one quality, monks, and I guarantee you non-return.
iti1:2.4: Abandon greed as the one quality, and I guarantee you non-return.”
iti1:2.6: This is the meaning of what the Blessed One said.
iti1:2.7: So with regard to this it was said:
iti1:3.2: beings go to a bad destination, coveting:
iti1:3.4: those who see clearly let go.
iti1:3.6: they never come to this world again.
iti1:4.1: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
